title: fragaria verna
intro: Fragaria verna, also known as the wood sorrel or wild strawberry, is a perennial herb native to Europe and North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a natural diuretic and to aid in digestion, due to its high concentration of salicylic acid and malic acid. The health benefits of Fragaria verna include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Herbal preparations of Fragaria verna include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
